Meaning.En: The distance from the top or surface to the bottom of something, especially a body of water or a hole.
Meaning.Example: The depth of the ocean in this region can exceed 10,000 meters.

Situation.Vi: Đo lường khoảng cách từ mặt nước đến đáy biển.
Situation.En: Measuring the distance from the water surface to the seabed.

Meaning.Vi: Độ sâu (về mặt trí tuệ, cảm xúc, hoặc nội dung)
Meaning.En: The quality of being profound or complex in thought, emotion, or meaning.
Meaning.Example: The novel is praised for its psychological depth and emotional resonance.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả sự sâu sắc trong suy nghĩ, cảm xúc, hoặc nghệ thuật.
Situation.En: Describing profundity in thought, emotion, or artistic expression.

Meaning.Vi: Chiều sâu (trong không gian hoặc hình ảnh)
Meaning.En: The measurement of an object or space from front to back, especially in visual representation.
Meaning.Example: Artists use perspective to create the illusion of depth on a flat canvas.

Situation.Vi: Trong hội họa hoặc nhiếp ảnh, tạo cảm giác ba chiều.
Situation.En: In painting or photography, creating a three-dimensional effect.
